Accenture Technology
Partners Our Work Our services Leaders Contact
Partners Our Work Our services Leaders Contact

Technology is at the heart of change

Trusted to innovate and execute

We help organizations worldwide use technology to reinvent how they work and operate. With global expertise, ever-evolving capabilities and deep industry knowledge, we solve challenges to unlock new possibilities and lasting growth. Together, we’ll make your vision a reality—no matter where you are on your journey.

Leading the industry

Inside Telstra’s AI reinvention with Accenture

This joint venture powers the telco leader’s ambitions of reinventing its business with AI and growing connections with customers.

Read more
Lan Guan named CNBC Changemaker

Accenture Chief AI Officer, Lan Guan, was named a 2025 CNBC Changemaker for her role in championing AI value.

Read more
Sen Ramani unveils 4 data & AI essentials

Sen Ramani, Accenture Global Data & AI Lead, reports from CES 2025 on how to apply value, data, talent and responsible AI to AI agents.

Reinvent with speed and confidence

We built 100 worldwide innovation hubs where you can test drive industry-led, focused solutions.

Read more

Power Sovereign AI for your region

Learn how to deliver nation-building AI capabilities with security, control and local culture built in

Building value within borders

As AI permeates all aspects of business and society, there is growing need for local ownership and control over all elements of the AI stack—including infrastructure, data, models, agents and applications. Our "Operating System for Sovereign AI Clouds”—built with NVIDIA and other ecosystem partners—is a holistic solution that helps Sovereign Frontliners to get to market fast with scalable, sovereign AI offerings that benefit their businesses and regions.

Download the report

Winning partnerships

View Transcript

We’ve forged deep partnerships with today’s top technology providers, as well as emerging leaders. That means you get access to the best and widest breadth of capabilities to meet your needs.

Explore our partnerships

Our work

Solving the world’s most pressing business challenges with tech
slideText 1 ofText / 1

Accelerating AXA insurance claims in the cloud

AXA, one of Europe's largest insurers, now offers customers accurate claims processing in seconds, not days—and has the insights it needs to make smarter business decisions.

Read more

Fortune turns years of data into insights

Accenture and Fortune transformed the iconic Fortune 500® list into an AI-driven platform that gives business leaders access to insights like never before.

Read more

NBCUniversal builds a streaming service with something for everyone

The media company partnered with Accenture to launch and scale Peacock, the fastest-growing streaming service platform in the U.S. for two consecutive years.

Read more

Accenture's zero trust strategy: Cloud security by design

Accenture evolves its security practice to support its core security values for the cloud.

Read more

BBVA banks on happy customers

A reinvented digital sales model has helped the global financial services company achieve a 117% growth in new customers in the last five years.

Read more

Our integrated solutions

  • Cloud
    Cloud

    Take the world by cloud

    Every day, cloud computing becomes more integral in driving reinvention and meeting the ever-changing needs of people around the world.

  • Data and AI
    Data and AI

    Lead in the age of generative AI

    In the last 30 years, no technology has promised to change everything across a business—until generative AI. Today, AI is the number one driver of business reinvention. And data readiness is one of the most important factors for AI success.

  • Cybersecurity
    Cybersecurity

    De-risk tomorrow by boosting cybersecurity today

    Infuse cybersecurity into your strategy and ecosystem to protect value, help prevent threats and build trust as you grow.

  • Application Transformation
    Application Transformation

    Become a world class software organization

    40% of companies cite outdated applications as a key barrier to cloud value. In today’s fast-paced landscape, adaptability is essential. Here’s how to transform your apps and unlock new business potential.

  • Managed Services
    Managed Services

    Managed services for changing more, faster

    As organizations strive to optimize cost and accelerate growth, strategic managed services can help to better prepare them to reinvent operations and drive holistic value at scale.

  • Technology Transformation
    Technology Transformation

    Reinvent your business with technology at the core

    Use everything technology offers to build a better business.

What we think

Research Report
Sovereign AI: From managing risk to accelerating growth

Sovereign AI isn’t just a control play—it’s a game-changer for global competitiveness and cultural value. Discover how organizations are moving fast to secure their advantage and shape AI’s future, following four bold moves.

Expand
Research Report
Trying to scale AI? You're going to need to think big. And act bigger.

The race to reinvent with generative AI is well underway. The time to determine if you’re leading or being left behind is now. Discover the front-runners' guide to scaling AI.

Expand
Research Report
4 critical actions to take now to strengthen your cyber defenses

Cyber risks are growing faster than ever, outpacing security efforts. How do you get ahead of these threats? In this year’s State of Cybersecurity Resilience, learn the steps to build resilience as you embrace AI transformation.

Expand
Research Report
Technology Vision 2025

AI is transforming business— driving autonomy, amplifying capabilities, and revolutionizing entire industries. From next-gen robotics to dynamic human-AI partnerships, discover the trends that are defining tomorrow, today.

Expand
Research Report
Building a reinvention-ready digital core

Building an industry-leading digital core requires a series of intentional steps in the design, development and operation stages.

Expand
Research Report
Reinventing with a digital core: How to accelerate growth through change

To capture the value of generative AI—or the next disruptive technology—companies need a digital core that is “reinvention ready.” Here are the three actions needed to achieve that coveted state.

Expand
Research Report
Build your tech and balance your debt

Why balancing—not eliminating—tech debt is key to reinventing with a modern digital core.

Expand
Perspective
Beyond Uptime: Fueling innovation with infrastructure management

The role of infrastructure managed services (IMS) in facilitating business reinvention.

Expand
